description: Chaos erupts within Afterlife as Malick's followers invade and take captives. Kora, now aligned with Nathaniel, confronts Jiaying and Li, expressing bitterness over her upbringing and the pain she’s endured. Jiaying pleads with her, but Kora sides with Nathaniel, using her powers against Li and solidifying her break from her previous life.

transcript.line: Gordon! Gordon! Gordon, are you all right?
There's too many of them.
Where did they come from?
I don't know. But they're taking people prisoner. What do we do?
That can't be Daisy.
Well, you've been no help.
Kora, get away from him!
Jiaying, right? You've put Kora through enough.
Kora... what are you doing?
I've been holding it in for so long. Trying to be what you wanted... to be something I'm not.
I only wanted what was best for you, to help you.
You turned on me. Like, since that day, there's only fear in your eyes. You don't see anything but a threat. Admit it.
No. I love you. I've always loved you no matter what...
You were gonna let him put a knife through my heart!
Never! Sweetheart. Sweetheart, remember when I would read you stories till you fell asleep? What would I always say at the beginning?
I'm not a child anymore.
I'd say, “Some stories have witches and dragons and bad men, and I will always protect you from all of it.”
You didn't protect me. You protected the world from me. Nathaniel's right. This is a prison, and I finally found my way out.
Thatagirl.
I'm sorry. She's beyond...
Li, no, stop!
Kora. Please stop!
Come on!
Get us out of here! Now!
